subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual youth! I have intoned the verses of thy gratitude unto God for what He hath bestowed upon thee of His grace and mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفتی الرحمانی انی رتلت ایات شکرک لله ما انعم علیک من فضله و رحمته
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
